meta_title: Men's Health GP in Preston | Testosterone, PSA & ED
meta_description: Private men's health appointments in Fulwood, Preston. Prostate checks, testosterone, erectile dysfunction, cardiovascular health and more. Dr Faizal Secretary. From £119.
hero_h1: Men's Health in Preston — The Appointment Worth Having
hero_sub: Prostate checks, testosterone, erectile dysfunction, cardiovascular health and more — a straightforward, no-judgement consultation with Dr Faizal Secretary in Fulwood, Preston.
hero_trust: From £119 · Prescription Writing Included · Same-Day Available
intro_quote: You've been putting it off. You know you have.
intro_heading: Men's Health Appointments in Fulwood, Preston
intro_para_1: Men are statistically less likely to see a GP than women. At My Private Clinic, we make it easy — no waiting weeks, no rushed 10-minute slot, no judgement.
intro_para_2: Prostate checks, testosterone levels, erectile dysfunction, cardiovascular risk and male menopause — conversations worth having with a doctor who has time to listen.

faqs.question: What men's health issues do you cover?
faqs.answer: Prostate checks (PSA testing), testosterone levels, erectile dysfunction, male menopause, cardiovascular screening, hair loss, weight management, mental health and more.

faqs.question: Is everything confidential?
faqs.answer: Completely. All consultations are private and confidential. Nothing is shared without your consent.

faqs.question: Can I get a testosterone test?
faqs.answer: Yes. A testosterone blood test can be arranged as part of your consultation. Results are explained personally by the doctor.

faqs.question: Do I need to see my NHS GP first?
faqs.answer: No. You can book directly — no referral needed. Just call or WhatsApp us on 07424 172034.
